title: MOBILE CRISIS SERVICES - 211info
text: KLAMATH BASIN BEHAVIORAL HEALTH WASHBURN MOBILE CRISIS SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Responds to individuals experiencing a mental health crisis by providing a mental health assessment to facilitate connection to the most appropriate community resource. Phone support, co-response, and in-person response services are available. 725 Washburn Way Klamath Falls, OR 97603 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Crisis line: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Walk-in crisis services: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (541) 883-1030 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Crisis Line (541) 883-1030 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or walk in for crisis services FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Klamath County SITE HOURS: -Office: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm. -Respite and residential programs: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Services: In Person Crisis Intervention Other Services Offered At This Location: INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - PHOENIX PLACE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. KLAMATH BASIN BEHAVIORAL HEALTH WASHBURN
